title: Fix MongoDB Query Projection to Ignore Missing Fields

statement.markdown: Write a MongoDB query projection function to filter out missing fields from a given document. The function should take a MongoDB document and a list of desired fields as input and return the filtered document without any missing fields.
statement.inputFormat: MongoDB document object and a list of desired fields
statement.notes: The function should not throw any errors if the input document is empty or if a desired field is missing.

examples.explanation: The function should return the filtered document with only the 'name' and 'age' fields.
The function should return an empty document if a desired field is missing.

hints.text: Use the MongoDB $project aggregation operator to filter the document.

starterCode.javascript: // Define a function to filter the MongoDB document
